title: Video-MME-Logical: A Controlled Diagnostic Benchmark for Video Temporal-Logical Reasoning
innovation_summary: Video-MME-Logical: A Controlled Diagnostic Benchmark for Video Temporal-Logical Reasoning: To isolate this capability, we introduce Video-MME-Logical, a controlled benchmark organized around five temporal-logical operations: state tracking, sequential counting, temporal ordering, dynamic spatiality, and structural composition.
